subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-26
subcodes.first_line: Severance from the world is the first sign of the Love of God. As long as man is much attached to this world he will be unaware of the Kingdom of God.
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @love of God
